# AvizSazeh Naghsh Jahan

> Architectural Engineering System (AECS) for suspended metal ceilings.
> AvizSazeh transforms architectural intent into buildable, engineered ceiling
> systems through engineering, customisation, and controlled execution.
> It is not a decoration brand or commodity manufacturer — it is a system
> integrator between architecture and execution.

Languages: Persian (fa, default) and English (en).
Regions served: Iran, Iraq, Oman, GCC.
Site: https://avizsazeh.ir

## Engineering systems
- Linear Ceiling System (/systems/linear-ceiling): directional aluminium strip system for airports, corridors, transport terminals.
- Open Cell System / Grilliom (/systems/open-cell): two-dimensional metal grid for malls, transport hubs, high-traffic public spaces.
- Metal Tile System (/systems/metal-tile): panelised galvanised-steel or aluminium tiles for halls, hospitals, sterile spaces; acoustic option with rock wool.
- Baffle System (/systems/baffle): vertical-fin / acoustic system for schools, libraries, acoustically sensitive spaces.

## Engineering flow
Design → Engineering → Manufacturing → Execution.
Every design is validated structurally before fabrication. Material selection without engineering is treated as project risk.

## Pages
- / : System entry point (homepage)
- /systems : System architecture overview
- /engineering : Engineering logic and execution process
- /projects : Executed projects and clients (proof layer)
- /about : Company, principles, and values
- /contact : Contact and location (Isfahan, Iran)
- /rfq : Engineering request engine — structured project definition (not a contact form)

## Capabilities
- Technical & engineering office producing custom shop, production, and installation drawings.
- Field installation across Iran and neighbouring countries; any climate; up to 50 m height.
- Project control with daily progress reporting from contract start.
- Authenticity and quality warranty on every product.
- Integrates with CBI Europe radiant systems.
